ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* The year for which data is recorded */,
  "year_quarter" TEXT /* The quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* The month of the year (January, February, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_houses" (
  "average_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average price record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the average price is recorded */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* The average house price for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the average price is recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("average_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_houses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_houses_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the tax rate is recorded */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* The tax rate for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the tax rate is recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_taxes" (
  "local_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local tax record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the local taxes are recorded */,
  "local_taxes" TEXT /* The local taxes for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the local taxes are recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_taxes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_taxes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_increases" (
  "increase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate increase record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the tax rate increase is recorded */,
  "tax_rate_increase" TEXT /* The tax rate increase for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the tax rate increase is recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("increase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_increases_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_increases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_taxes_increases" (
  "local_increase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local tax increase record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the local tax increase is recorded */,
  "local_taxes_increase" TEXT /* The local tax increase for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the local tax increase is recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_increase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_taxes_increases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_taxes_increases_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the data is recorded */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the data is recorded */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* The average house price for the year and region */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* The tax rate for the year and region */,
  "local_taxes" TEXT /* The local taxes for the year and region */,
  "tax_rate_increase" TEXT /* The tax rate increase for the year and region */,
  "local_taxes_increase" TEXT /* The local tax increase for the year and region */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  "forecasted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is forecasted or actual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the economic factor (e.g., 'macroeconomic', 'microeconomic') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the political factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the political factor (e.g., 'local', 'national') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor value record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the factor value is recorded */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor for which the value is recorded */,
  "factor_value" TEXT /* The value of the economic or political factor for the year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the factor value is recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES economic_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES political_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_values_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, financial analyst, public user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the data source (e.g., 'official', 'unofficial') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Who reviewed the data quality metric */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the data quality metric was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecast model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Last date the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_value" TEXT /* Forecasted value (e.g., average house price, tax rate) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "forecasted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the result is a forecast or actual data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_results_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Who assigned the role to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
